name: ultraprompt
description: Ultraprompt V8.7 cognitive control-plane plugin for Claude Code and Codex: 49 skills, 30 agents, 43 MCP tools, 31 commands, typed local memory, safe dream jobs, governed learning, workflow pathfinding, capability graph, live Mission Control dashboard, evidence-led release gates, dual-runtime install. V8.7 adds an interactive routing picker: ambiguity-detecting UserPromptSubmit hook + route_picker MCP tool + ultraprompt:choose skill that surfaces top skill candidates and LLM-rewritten prompt variants via AskUserQuestion with previews, then dispatches the chosen skill with the chosen phrasing.
compatibility_notes: V8.7.0 preserves the native Codex manifest. Installer does not copy the Claude manifest over Codex metadata.
Hooks may require feature detection depending on Codex runtime version.
Subagents supported via Task tool; agent definitions shared with Claude runtime.
Cognitive memory, dreams, learning, and pathfinding are local-first and governed by release gates.
